---
title: Energy-Efficient 360-Degree Video Rendering on FPGA via Algorithm-Architecture
  Co-Design
author:
- Qiuyue Sun
- Amir Taherin
- Yawo Siatitse
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/fpga20.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/energy-efficient-360-degree-video-rendering-on-fpga-via-algorithm-architecture-co-design
journ: FPGA
year: 2020
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 35
---
